## What does this change?

<!-- A clear, concise description. Link any related issue: Closes #123 -->

## Type

- [ ] Spec change (`spec/`) — schema, examples, and `spec/README.md` all updated
- [ ] Reference implementation (`cli/`)
- [ ] Docs / examples
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `PYTHONPATH=src pytest tests/ -q` passes (from `cli/`)
- [ ] `python demo/demo.py` passes
- [ ] If the ABOM format changed, the JSON Schema, examples, and reference impl are all in sync
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) per the DCO
